creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #5)
Ex, I've build pgbouncer as:

databases/pgbouncer# make PGBOUNCER_RUNDIR=/var/run/pgbouncer-main PGBOUNCER_LOGDIR=/var/log install

I've got pgbouncer.ini with:
logfile = /var/log/pgbouncer/pgbouncer.log
pidfile = /var/run/pgbouncer/pgbouncer.pid

But rc-script have pidfile="/var/run/pgbouncer-main/$name.pid".
